note: Phase 15G — split validation ledger. The loader merges every file listed here (deduped by case_id). seed_cases.json is unchanged from Phase 15B. holdout/pending/training start EMPTY and are grown via scripts/phase_15g_add_validation_case.py or the Phase 15J candidate factory — no invented data. NOTE: validation_cases/candidates/ and acquisition_backlog.json are deliberately ABSENT here — candidates and planning targets are NEVER loaded as validation cases.

files.note: Phase 12/13 development seed; all used_for_training (NOT clean holdout). FROZEN baseline (avg MAE 25.30).
Blind, unseen cases. New scored cases default to used_for_holdout=true and live here.
Cases with a locked prediction whose observed outcome is not yet recorded.
Phase 15J — NEW reviewed training cases promoted from the candidate factory (used_for_training). Starts EMPTY; seed_cases.json stays frozen.
